entry.title: Path of Exile v2.1.0
entry.content:
## The built in python client is now removed. # Use the client here: https://github.com/stubobis1/Path-of-Exile-Archipelago-Client/releases/tag/2.1.0
### New Feature: Area Locations
- Removed legacy Python client (Client.py, poeClient/) — replaced by standalone Electron client - Fixed generation logic indentation causing incorrect item/location pool building - Normal item placement fixes - Area location data updates

entry.title: Gauntlet Legends v2.1.6
entry.content:
REQUIRED: Archipelago -> https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases REQUIRED: Retroarch -> https://www.retroarch.com/?page=platforms Drag and drop gl.apworld into your custom_worlds folder in your Archipelago install.
You can launch the client from ArchipelagoLauncher, just click on the Gauntlet Legends Client button.
To patch the game, you are required to have a US copy of Gauntlet Legends for the N64. Either drag the patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe or Right click the patch and 'Open With...' ArchipelagoLauncher.exe The host does not need to have a copy of the game to generate.
RETROARCH IS REQUIRED IT IS THE ONLY EMULATOR THAT WILL WORK.
IN RETROARCH: You must go to Settings->User Interface and turn the Show Advanced Settings ON. Then in Settings-> Network, you must also turn ON Network Commands. Leave the port the default.
Make sure you use Mupen64-plus-next in Retroarch as your core.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/GauntletLegendsAP/compare/v2.1.5...v2.1.6

entry.title: The Farmer Was Replaced v0.0.6b0
entry.content:
For installation instructions, please [see the ReadMe](https://github.com/seadoggie001/TFWR-APMod?tab=readme-ov-file)
## Fixes
- Grass Sanity can now be turned off via Options - A new option "Goal" replaced the old "Easy Mode" toggle - `Gold` requires you to collect 1,000 gold from mazes - `Dinosaur Tail` requires you to get a tail with a length of 1,000 (this is almost the entire fully-expanded farm) - Notification Popups are positioned in the bottom right corner to avoid hiding behind your inventory - Trap items are handled correctly - Mazes now require Senses (`get_entity_type` is needed to find the treasure)
### Known Issues:
- Free Hay does nothing. I'm considering using it to give a bonus 5% of your current hay, or 5 whichever is more. - You may receive many other extra filler items that do absolutely nothing. I plan to adjust/remove them later.

entry.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Dungeon Dice Monsters v0.3.4
entry.content:
# v0.3.4 New Features
## Set Starting Dice You can now specify up to 15 named dice to start your run with!
## Free Duel Pool and Free Duel Opponents You can now specify how many duelists will be in your free duel pool, allowing you to limit the number of locations in free duel mode when you set shorter goals. In addition to that, you can also specify which if any duelists you'd like to guarantee will be in your free duel pool.
## Location Groups You can now use Location Group names in your yaml for options like exclude_locations or priority_locations. You can find more info about what those names are and what they cover in the new [Location Groups Info Doc](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Location%20Groups%20Info.md)
# Documentation Links
[Info About YuGiOh DDM Randomizer](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/en_YuGiOh!%20Dungeon%20Dice%20Monsters.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/setup_en.md) [Grandpa's Shop Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Grandpas%20Shop%20Guide.md) [Location Groups Info](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Location%20Groups%20Info.md)

entry.title: Vacation Simulator v0.0.3
entry.content:
This is a rewrite of the Vacation Simulator APWorld released by chandler. Current changes from that APWorld include: - Rewriting all of the logic using RuleBuilder, which should speed the world up slightly and add some extras for players - Reduced Fill Errors by making all non logically required Memories into standard items instead of progression. - Has an `archipelago.json` file, so the world will work in future versions of AP
The world still uses the same slot data formatting and yaml settings as the original, so it should be a drop in replacement in it's current state. This may change in later updates.

entry.title: Hi-Fi RUSH v0.3.1
entry.content:
See [README](https://github.com/TRPG0/HbkArchipelago/blob/main/README.md) for install instructions.
Packaged with `zDEV-UE4SS_v3.0.1-947-g06474186`, `hibiki-bootstrap-v0.2.0`
- Fixed Track 7: VLog "Food Delivery Warning" not being checked properly. - Fixed an issue where items from other players may not be received properly if found before starting a save file. - Added an autosave when the stage select menu is opened to prevent items from not saving properly in the Hideout. - Changed how VLogs are received to reduce crashing.

entry.title: Clair Obscur Expedition 33 v0.2.1
entry.content:
- This version add superbosses exclusion in options - Remove and changes some locations
## What's Changed * Adding superbosses & handling multiple locations by @Demorck in https://github.com/Demorck/ClairObscur_APWorld/pull/44
## New Contributors * @Demorck made their first contribution in https://github.com/Demorck/ClairObscur_APWorld/pull/44 (lmao)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Demorck/ClairObscur_APWorld/commits/v0.2.1

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.6
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.5](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.5)
## Changelog - Fix spheres+distance level scaling not correctly accounting for events when calculating distance.
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later._

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.3.post4
entry.content:
Added missing tech for Sigvald. Removed inaccessible buildings for Daemons Undivided. Added the under-empire for skaven. Added missing Clan Moulder tech/ritual. Fixed battlesanity bug. Fixed despoilersanity bug. Fixed Changeling sanity not working for buildings. Fixed integer underflow on trap. Re-enabled Empire rituals (whoops).
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.2...v0.10.3

entry.title: Another Crab's Treasure v0.5.0
entry.content:
This version has unstable features
New Game Plus features and content may not work properly or have unintended effects. Use at your own risk and report any problems you encounter.
The item map tracker is also unfinished. Please report any issues you encounter with it.
This update includes a lot of bug fixes and compatibility with the most recent version of ACT

entry.title: Garfield Kart - Furious Racing v0.5.3b0
entry.content:
**This is an APWorld only update.**
- Fixed numerous issues with Universal Tracker, adding proper support for it. - Added yamlless Universal Tracker support - Converted the rules to Rule Builder for better compatibility

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.2
entry.content:
## Fixes to Mod
* Fixed an issue in bundling where certain files would not be found in the archive (@CodeTriangle, #75).

entry.title: Baba Is You v0.3.0
entry.content:
Another large update, now featuring levels from ??? and ABC, alongside a new option to place Blossoms at world clears, as was commonly suggested. Levels from Depths, Meta, and Center have yet to be implemented since logic needs to be written for level access, but this update also contains some new tools to hopefully make that easier.
NOTE: v0.6.7 of Archipelago is required due to the use of Rule Builder.
## New features: - (All) Added levels from ??? and ABC - (All) Implemented "Flower" area access and "Reach Depths" goal - (All) Added "Place Blossoms at World Clears" option, which forces Blossoms and Blossom Petals to be placed at world clear locations. - (Levelpack) Added many new features to Manual mode- see the [readme](worlds/baba_is_you/BABAPELAGO_README.md#offline-testing) for details - (Tracker) Universal tracker's tabs now appear inside of the Baba Is You client if it is installed - Thanks to Faris and qwint for helping me figure this out! - (Tracker) The map tab now shows every location instead of just "Win" locations, including "Clear", "Complete", "Bonus", and "Transform" locations
## Adjustments/fixes: - (APWorld) There are now 10 blossoms by default instead of 12 - (APWorld) All rules now use Rule Builder (some didn't in the previous version) - (APWorld) Fixed generation failure if Transformsanity was disabled and a level with transformations was accessible - (APWorld) Added OptionErrors when attempting to use unimplemented features, and fixed other generation failures - (APWorld) The Goal Levels option is now automatically capped at the max amount of levels possible with the current settings - (APWorld) Fixed Chasm-Extra 1 not logically connecting to Chasm-Extra 4 - (APWorld) Logic was adjusted for the following levels: - Trick Door (Alt solution found by Uni) - A Way Out? (fixed requiring You and not requiring Win) - (Levelpack) Added some more error messages - (Client) Fixed the levelpack not updating itself if the version you had was pre-v2.0 - Also fixed the levelpack ALWAYS updating itself regardless of version... - (Client) Fixed the save slot command causing an error when used mid-game - (Tracker) The tracker now shows logic based on your selected difficulty
This contains the Baba Is You APWorld, the Babapelago levelpack, and extraslot.lua. ONLY THE APWORLD IS REQUIRED! It contains the levelpack as well and will automatically install the pack when starting. The levelpack is included in case this feature doesn't work for whatever reason, and extraslot.lua is a global mod needed to play more than three slots at once, if you wish to do so. The host only needs the APWorld no matter what.
For installation instructions, PLEASE check out the [readme](worlds/baba_is_you/BABAPELAGO_README.md). Very important!
KNOWN ISSUES: - The client may suddenly stop sending checks (I haven't encountered this in a while, so it may have been fixed). Closing and re-opening the client should fix the issue. If you DON'T relaunch Baba Is You, the checks should send again next time you complete a level. - There may be issues on Mac and Linux, since I haven't been able to test those myself. Please report any issues you experience. - Normal/hard logic has been well tested, although It was not feasible to test every possible combination of items. Please report any issues. In particular, Ultimate Maze's transforms are a complicated case. - Some non-ascii or punctation characters may display strangely in the client, but this hasn't caused any crashes from my testing. Supposedly this does cause a crash on Mac, although I'm hesitant to fully confirm this.

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.4
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Made post-PonR state playable. - The randomizer mod will now remove the usual post-PonR barriers in Central Hall, CTH, Galactic Dock and TRC, as well as force FSP to stay in its normal not-trashed-by-Eigong state. This should allow you to check any and all randomizer locations after triggering PonR, while also completing the unrandomized post-PonR sidequests if you feel like it. - Fixed the Central Hall elevator showing red "Damaged Floor" buttons all the time. Turns out this was tied to the New Kunlun Control Hub entrance being in its post-PonR state where it shows a button prompt when you walk past it. This fix might only take effect on fresh saves. - `vanilla` logic: - "GoS (East): Upper Right of Room Above Yin Jifu's Tomb" now requires (AD and LG) or CL. The "or LG" was missing before. - "Yinglong Canal: Near Root Node" now allows falling down from upper Yinglong, even if you can't climb up to this chest from the root node - `medium` logic: - "AF (Depths) - Root Node" to "Shangui Arena" now allows Air Dash and T-dash - "AM - Left Exit" to "Above Left Exit" now allows bow hover and Cloud Leap instead of Grapple - "AM - Upper Right Exit" now allows using bow hover from the light spinner ledge far to its left - "CTH - Bottom of Large Shaft" to "Yanren Arena" now allows Air Dash, Cloud Leap, T-dash and *Wall Climb* (instead of Tai-Chi Kick) - "ED (Passages): Covered By Lasers" now logically allows bypassing the zipline with bow hover - "ED (Passages): Hack 2 Statues" now allows bow hover and Ledge Grab to reach the left statue, as well as Cloud Piercer S/X to break its shield - "ED (Sanctum) - Right Exit" to "Root Node" is now itemless because Swift Runner is enough for this jump - "Factory (GH) - Hammer Brothers Roof" to "Above Root Node" now allows bow hover and ledge grab - "Factory (U) - Broken Shanhai" to "Middle Right Exit" now also requires (Cloud Leap or Ledge Grab) to get onto the ledge above the broken Shanhai. Previously, `vanilla` logic had this requirement but I forgot to copy it to `medium`. - "GoS (East): Upper Right of Room Above Yin Jifu's Tomb" now requires (AD and LG) or CL. On `medium` you can get to this *region* with T-dashes, and the location was incorrectly not requiring any movement items. - "TRC: Above Sol Statue" now allows falling from "Upper Levels", T-dashing, then Air Dashing onto the platform with the chest - `ledge_storage` logic: - "AM - Left Exit" to "Above Left Exit" now allows parry hover and Cloud Leap instead of Grapple - "AM - Upper Right Exit" now allows using parry hover with CL setup from the light spinner ledge far to its left - "ED (Passages): Above Transporter" now allows parry hover into Cloud Leap to reach the rope - "ED (Passages) - Outside Tianshou Arena" can now be logically reached with CL & LG / a triple jump from below the shortcut rope - "ED (Passages): Covered By Lasers" now allows bypassing the zipline with parry hover - "ED (Passages) - Left Exit" to the Root Node now allows parry hovers - "Factory (MR) - Left Elevator" to "Walking Chest Above Green Pillar" now allows CL & LG / a triple jump - "Factory (GH) - Hammer Brothers Roof" to "Above Root Node" now allows T-dash setup into parry hover - Factory (GH)'s platform puzzle room now allows wall sliding up either wall, then Air Dash and Cloud Leap to reach either of the upper platforms without Nymph - "Factory (PA) - Root Node" to "Lower Left Fire Zone" now allows CL & LG & AD / a triple jump with an Air Dash between jumps instead of using Nymph to lower the rope - 0.5.2 claimed the FSP tree-growing chests were in logic with CL & LG / triple jumps, but due to a silly typo, they were not. Now they are for real. - GoS (West) now allows parry hovering over the Cixing Arena - The last step of Sky Tower climb now also requires nymph to unlock the door to the root node. Previously, lower logic levels had this requirement but I forgot to copy it to LS logic. - Climbing up to "TRC - Lower Sickbay" can now be done with CL & LG / a triple jump instead of SMB. - Fixed the Cortex Center flower directly giving skill points instead of just checking an AP location - Add a comment about client/mod settings like Death Link to the example yaml - Extended 0.4.5's "item re-apply checks" to Sol Seals. In other words, if Yi is somehow missing a Sol Seal that we've already received the AP item for (after loading a save file), the mod will now "re-apply" the missing Seal and display a warning. This should mitigate various unreproducible glitches, but if you find a way to consistently trigger these warnings please report it so we can fix the underlying bug.

entry.title: Pikmin 2 v0.7.2
entry.content:
**NOTE: This mod is still in the testing phase. Play at your own risk.** **NOTE 2: Games generated on earlier versions will NOT work on this version.**
## Changelog - Fix a bug where Violet Candypop Buds would not show up on the boss floor of Submerged Castle if it was shuffled to Floor 1 or 2. - The limits on Violet/Ivory Candypop Buds showing up on early floors have been removed entirely - Fix a bug where Ivory Candypop Buds would not show up if they had not been discovered in Awakening Wood - Fix a bug where Floor 4 of Submerged Castle could be encountered with no ability to easily clear the poison vents - Even if enemy rando is on, there is now guaranteed to be at least one Bulbmin on this floor - Fix a bug where Wistful Wild would open when the debt was paid even if both globes had not been collected - Fix a bug where logic would expect you to be able to access the onion in Perplexing Pool, even if you don't have White Pikmin unlocked - Fix the most annoying bug this project has faced, aka the duplicate item receipt bug. Thank you to Sol for discovering the source of the bug! - There may still be some situations where it occurs, but most should be fixed. Please let me know if you still encounter it. - Remove the "Last Treasure Received" counter as it was taking up too much game memory - This will be re-implemented in the future - Fix a bug where enemies in dead-ends would already be spawned instead of dropping from the ceiling - This may cause crashes in enemy rando, please let me know if you experience this - Fix a bug where generations could fail due to invalid treasure/poko collection options. Thank you to KingDragonite for discovering the bug and providing some of the code to fix it. - Fix a bug where the client would not properly launch Dolphin on Linux. Thank you to Aurifier for sharing the fix to this! - Remove the "Nothing" item and implement the "Weapons In Pool" option in a cleaner way - Fix a bug where the "Collect Treasure" win condition included filler items - Add new filler items: Pikmin checks - There are checks for each Pikmin type, and the frequency of each can be set in the YAML - The number of Pikmin you get from the check and the leaf type of the spawned Pikmin can also be set in the YAML - These checks can be obtained before the Pikmin type is actually unlocked, but you won't be able to access the Pikmin until the type is unlocked
## Known Bugs - Game will occasionally crash when loading the next day after the debt is repaid - Game will occasionally crash upon picking up certain treasures. This commonly happens with the first treasure you pick up on Day 2, usually whatever is in the Utter Scrap location. Entering a cave before collecting it usually avoids the crash. - Queen Candypop Buds sometimes show up as white instead of red, even if you have Red Pikmin unlocked. This means that you can't use them to generate Red Pikmin, but you can use them to generate White Pikmin. - Whatever cave is in Submerged Castle's location will always have the vanilla Submerged Castle music. - Sometimes starting items will not be received properly, if this happens usually restarting the game and client causes them to appear - Sometimes the Pikmin can't break gates in caves. Usually resetting the cave fixes this.

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.5
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Fix the AFE arena softlock introduced in 0.5.4.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.4
entry.content:
You must re-build sm64ex if you have an older version!
## New Features
- Added Purple Switches as unlockable progression items. - Added Wet-Dry World Water Level Diamonds as unlockable progression items. - Added Tick Tock Clock Spinners as unlockable progression items. - Added Mario's Hat as an optional item that can be shuffled. - Added an unlock item for Bowser in the Fire Sea.
## New Randomization Options
- All level-feature shuffles that were not originally act-specific features can now be toggled through YAML options. - Rolling Logs now shuffles the Tall, Tall Mountain Rolling Log in addition to the Lethal Lava Land Rolling Log, and can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items, and now includes the Rolling Log in - Purple Switches can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items. - Checkerboard Platforms can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items.
## Coin Star Changes
- Coins Star checks have been renamed from "100 Coins" to "Coins Star." - Coins Stars are now always included and can no longer be disabled. - Added YAML options to configure the Coins Star requirement for each main course individually.
## Level Changes
- Defeating Big Boo in Big Boo's Haunt no longer spawns the staircase star. - The Big Boo star has been moved to the ground floor near the staircase.
## Interface Improvements
- Redesigned the pause menu to display per-level feature unlocks and Coins Star coin requirements. - Moved the HUD coin counter to the top-right corner of the screen. - Simplified file select progress displays.
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed music shuffle.

entry.title: Monster Hunter Freedom Unite v0.0.2
entry.content:
# Bug Fixes * Actually implement quest deathlink (it was left unimplemented intentionally but I forgot to remove the option) * Fix a set of errors caused by quest randomization being disabled * Fix deathlink tracking whether or not you are walking, rather than if you carted * Fix incorrect pointers for US and EU versions of the game * Fixed *many* quests not being registered by the client
# Other Changes * Enabling Cash Only Equipment will now attempt to put the next rank's equipment in the pool if there is space (in place of standard filler items).

entry.title: Sentinels of the Multiverse v0.4.6
entry.content: Updated Artifact Comics content and combined it into a single source Several minor fixes

entry.title: Shadow The Hedgehog v0.4.8
entry.content:
Fix release files for previous version. Disable active debugging code correctly including for client loading. Fix issues with Universal Tracker.
==Please note all the below are a WIP, if you wish to contribute to improve== Level Guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AhW4_tbdYi1otHE17zuGV4dDjaR6xaNDB6nT8rVNY0o/edit?usp=sharing
Setup Guide: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/setup_en.md
Readme: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/en_Shadow%20The%20Hedgehog.md
Archipelago Wiki: https://archipelago.miraheze.org/wiki/Shadow_the_Hedgehog
_Changes since last big release (0.2.7)_ **Item Box Sanity** Capsules, boxes containing capsules are added as optional sanity.
**Checkpoint Shuffle** Random starting checkpoint for levels and unlockable checkpoints as items in game.
**Checkpoint Convenience** Option available to be able to go back to any previous activated checkpoint when playing with checkpoint sanity on.
**Improved Logic Handling** Reworked logic for all enemies, items, weapons, etc to improve seeds.
**Key Shuffle** Options related to key items and key doors allowing for more varied routes through stages.
**Last Way Early** Previous Last Way was only included in story shuffle with the option, but now available by selecting Last Story even when playing select, preventing Devil Doom.
**Select Gates** Gates added so stage accessibility is not locked to single stage unlocks.
**Traps** Small assortment of traps added - Checkpoint, Ammo and Poison.

entry.title: Anodyne v0.6.3
entry.content: - Solves default decimal trap weights failing generation - Fixes trap counts being lower than expected weights

entry.title: Rift of the Necrodancer v0.13.0
entry.content:
# Additions - [APWorld] Added `Volume 2` DLC Songs - [Client] `Unplayed` filter option now will only display currently unlocked songs
# Changes - [Client] Updated Archipelago.MultiClient.Net to 6.7.1
# Bug Fixes - [Client] Fixed songs not locking properly after Volume 2 update - [Client] Base game songs should now reunlock properly when free play is disabled

entry.title: Brave Fencer Musashi v0.7.0
entry.content:
Added: -added time sanity -complex logic rewrite -added URI client launch support (aka click on your slot to launch game) -fixes for trap sanity and open world
Note: -Must use Archipelago v0.6.7 or newer -Not compatible with XDelta Patches, must run unmodified game -not compatible with prior apworld generations -map tracker with Universal Tracker https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases/tag/Tracker_v0.2.32 -setup guide:https://github.com/AegeusEvander/Brave-Fencer-Musashi-AP-World/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md -Follow development and report bugs on the Archipelago gg Discord, -> Future-game-design -> Brave Fencer Musashi

entry.title: Mega Man X2 v1.2.1
entry.content: QoL changes. No version change in-game because the current ASM source contains Good Stuff:tm: I can't share yet. # Info * [Setup](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/setup.html) # Changes * ~~Stole~~ Copied Mega Man 1/2/3's way to extract ROMs from the X Legacy Collection executable file * Added skip balancing tag to X-Hunter and Sigma stages

entry.title: Mega Man X3 v1.5.2.post2
entry.content: QoL changes. No version change in-game because the current ASM source contains Good Stuff:tm: I can't share yet. # Info * [Setup](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/setup.html) # Changes * ~~Stole~~ Copied Mega Man 1/2/3's way to extract ROMs from the X Legacy Collection executable file * Fixed XML file failing to be appropriately copied to the patch/ROM location * Added a missing file in the Names directory

entry.title: Hunie Pop v2.3.1
entry.content:
- (APWorld) Put shop items behind getting 4 date passes when progressive dates are enabled - (APWorld) Throw error/exception when YMAL has no girls enabled - (APWorld) Added check for "number_of_starting_girls" so that its not higher than number of girls enabled V2.3.0 changelog - (APWorld/Client/PopTracker) Added option/logic for having progressive dates - (APWorld) Fixed issue with custom options when set to min or max value - (APWorld) Fixed Universal Tracker compatibility - (APWorld) Changed Default option order and fixed some typos

CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop Installed - Download Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop.exe" is if it asks you to overwrite files click yes - NOTE if you get a game crash when starting the game make sure that in "{huniepop game directory}/BepInEx/config/BepInEx.cfg" the 2nd last option is "type = MonoBehaviour" not "type = Application" APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy "Hunie Pop Archipelago poptracker.zip" to your poptracker "packs" folder

entry.title: Rabi-Ribi v1.5.2
entry.content:
## Quick Links - [Game Info Page](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/en_Rabi-Ribi.md) - [Setup Guide](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/setup_beta_en.md) - [Known Issues](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3Abug)
## Before Playing This randomizer assumes the player is aware of hidden techniques that allow the game to be beaten without items, even at the lowest settings. It is HIGHLY recommended to play through the Basic section of the [Platforming Tricks Tutorial](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1706422414) before starting your first seed!
Additionally, the logic assumes that the player knows of hidden paths throughout the game, revealed with Ribbon, Fire Orb, or Carrot Bombs. A patch is available to expose these paths, alongside other useful features! It can be enabled by setting "Apply Beginner Mod" to `true`.
## What's Changed * Fix import error in visualizer.py by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/92 * Fix Player Icon Position in UT Minimap by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/93
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/compare/1.5.1...1.5.2

entry.title: Kirby Air Ride v1.0.0
entry.content:
# KARchipelago v1.0.0-TEST
Forget everything you thought you knew about the APWorld for Kirby Air Ride. This is a **FULL RE-RELEASE** of the apworld, featuring a **NEW, NATIVE GAME MOD**. We have a TON of new features and enhancements to existing features:
- randomization of all 3 checklists - checkbox rewards are AP items now and get shuffled - this also means CROSS-MODE shuffling. Do an Air Ride checkbox to get a City Trial reward, etc. - full gating for: - CT stadiums - CT events - CT items (everything) - includes patches - includes boxes (blue/green/red) - machines (all of them, including top ride) - copy abilities (shared gate across all 3 modes) - kirby colors (shared gate across all 3 modes) - AR courses - TR courses - TR items - EVERY item in the game is an AP item, plus: - permanent +1 patches for CT, AR, and stadiums - item spawn rate up - patch cap increase - checkbox fillers (all modes) - all up/down - instant Dragoon/Hydra - big/small kirby (cosmetic, all modes) - new goals: - CT max stats - location lists (any mode) - create custom goal playthroughs with lists of locations to complete - death link - all modes - energy link - all modes - energy comes from machine charge, and can also charge your machine with energy - in-game energylink spend menu to spend energy on items - trap link - all modes - a few custom traps! - 1 HP trap - drop patches trap - local multiplayer support (shared items for all human players) - new in-game settings menu
### ***This is a TESTING release. Logic is not guaranteed to be correct! Other things will VERY likely break!***
We need TESTERS to help test this out before making an official release. This was a huge rewrite with a brand new mod, I *definitely* missed things! Maybe obvious things!
Please give this a go and **let me know what bugs you find** so we can make this a nice stable release that doesn't break multiworlds!
Get it here:
- apworld: https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/releases/latest - mod: https://github.com/DeDeDeK/karchipelago-mod/releases/latest - setup guide: https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/blob/main/worlds/kirby_air_ride/docs/setup_en.md
## What's Changed * v1.0.0-TEST PR by @DeDeDeK in https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/pull/51
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/compare/v0.6.0...v1.0.0-TEST

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.3
entry.content:
Quick patch: * Added a "Hide Finished Tasks" Button * Added the ability to consume consumables manually when they are not tied to any tasks * Added a section in the items tab to view the number of received items in a given progression or currency grouping
These updates are mirrored in the [web client](https://barretg.github.io/Taskipelago/web-client/) with mobile support!

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.8
entry.content: ## Changes - A toggle for teleport, on-demand with a bind so neat! Lets players choose their journey, each honest step, each feat. ## Bugfixes - In Who Dump where blueprints twirl in a swirl, `Rocket Spring` blocks the path to collect them all, unless `Grinch Copter` unfurls.

entry.title: Factorio - Space Age Without Space v0.9.2
entry.content:
## 0.9.2 * Made Energy Bridge recipe actually random * Made fish immune to lightning strikes. * Adjusted recipe costs to be more accurate, which should lead to more interesting seeds. * Fixed CLI not working. * Updated the way the mod handles text localisation.
## 0.9.1 * Science Packs are now given randomised names. * Changed the 'Vanilla' yellow science pack to be crafted in a centrifuge, then added it to the machine shuffle. * Fixed a bug with Universal Tracker compatibility. * Made fruit trees immune to lightning strikes.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.5
entry.content:
You must re-build sm64ex if you have an older version!
- Added Universal Tracker support. - Added per-level move randomizer modes for all 10 movement abilities. - Added missing per-level Purple Switch items for JRB, DDD, TTM, and THI. - Added Water Level Diamond item. - Added Drain the Moat location check and Unlock Vanish Cap Under the Moat item. The grate opening and the moat draining are now separate. - Added Wing Mario Over the Rainbow Bob-omb Buddy check and cannon unlock item. - Added Coinsanity option. - Reworked and fixed Tiny-Huge Island logic. - Reworked and fixed Wet-Dry World logic - Fixed Hazy Maze Cave coin logic. - Adjusted Dire, Dire Docks logic to account for triple jumping onto the sub, and reaching poles from the sub. - Renamed/formatted cannon and painting unlock item names consistently with hyphens. - Improved the pause menu.
As always, let me know what's broken!

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.4a0
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v9.0+ [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md)
## Logic 🧮 - Added TotOK B12 hammer chest without hammer - Killing Gleeok with bombs now requires 2 bomb bags - Added new hammer skew to Mutoh's bk chest to glitched logic - Added ToI basement boomerang switches with hammer to hard logic - Made some new videos for the Tricks and Skips doc - Figured out precise conditions for pirate ambush (it's not random!), and updated logic accordingly - Fixed temple of wind boss key chest needing bombs and not chus - Fixed temple of fire oob connecting to the wrong region
## Flags 🚩 - Courage crest check correctly requires the sw sea chart when map warp is enabled - Added safety for salvage repair kits stealing the salvage arm - Made sure triforce crest is removed correctly after ghost ship - Getting pirate ambush before unlocking the ghost ship hunt works
## Map Warp 🗺️ - Map warping from the sea is now enabled, but you can only warp to quadrants whose sea charts you've unlocked - You can no longer map warp to sea quadrants without the correct sea chart
## Entrance Rando 🚪 - Exiting courage temple puts you outside the gates even if they're closed - Fixed client crash on trying to redisconnect entrances that were not properly stored
## Other 🛍️ - Bonk trees no longer require a reload to reset, you can bonk again as soon as the rupee despawns. - Unfortunately i could not make it consistent for dig spots, cause buried rupees are actors and actor spawning is annoying. - Added the /carrot_asked client command, that gives good debug info to send to me when something goes wrong. It's basically the stuff i usually ask for from the debug launcher, but without needing the debug launcher. - Fixed faulty key address that could cause keys to not be received in dungeon - Reworked Item Group definitions, and added some more aliases.

entry.title: Wario Land 4 v3.4.0
entry.content: ## General changes * World now requires AP 0.6.7 or newer ## Generation changes * Fixed the generator choking when all items are set as non-local ## Option changes * Added new levels "intermediate" and "anything goes" to the logic difficulty option * Intermediate requires some of the simpler tricks originally in advanced logic * Anything goes is currently relegated to a single new trick in TTL that's both difficult and risky * Check the [trick guide](https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Wario-Land-4/blob/main/src/wl4/docs/en_Wario%20Land%204.md#what-do-the-logic-levels-do) for details * **Note:** The PopTracker will need to be updated to reflect this option properly because the internal representation for advanced has changed * If the required jewels option is set higher than the pool jewels option, the former is now adjusted down instead of the latter up ## Logic changes * Fixed logic not accounting for Ringosukis at the top of the jungle room in PZ on Hard and S-Hard * Fixed a logical point of no return for TBT Toy Car Tower Diamond * New tricks: * Intermediate: * MJ with Grab instead of Ground Pound * Front of TBB with Grab in open portals * Advanced: * PZ jungle room with minion jump * Escape PZ without Ground Pound * TBB bouncy room alcove with minion jumps * Anything Goes: * Escape TTL without Super Ground Pound ## Universal Tracker changes * You can now use /explain to read about this world's logic rules, including the effects of logic difficulty

entry.title: Kirby Air Ride v1.0.0
entry.content:
- Fixes for not being able to hook into dolphin due to DME type checking differences across versions
## What's Changed * Fixes by @DeDeDeK in https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/pull/52
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DeDeDeK/KARchipelago/compare/v1.0.0-TEST...v1.0.1-TEST

entry.title: Rabi-Ribi v1.5.3
entry.content:
## Quick Links - [Game Info Page](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/en_Rabi-Ribi.md) - [Setup Guide](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/setup_beta_en.md) - [Known Issues](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3Abug)
## Before Playing This randomizer assumes the player is aware of hidden techniques that allow the game to be beaten without items, even at the lowest settings. It is HIGHLY recommended to play through the Basic section of the [Platforming Tricks Tutorial](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1706422414) before starting your first seed!
Additionally, the logic assumes that the player knows of hidden paths throughout the game, revealed with Ribbon, Fire Orb, or Carrot Bombs. A patch is available to expose these paths, alongside other useful features! It can be enabled by setting "Apply Beginner Mod" to `true`.
## What's Changed * Fix Calculation of Available Magic Types by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/94
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/compare/1.5.2...1.5.3

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.5.3
entry.content: - Reworked how secret exits are checked. - Fixed the Pump Charge shotgun being unable to primary fire if attempting to use the secondary fire while it is not unlocked. - Fixed random music validation not working properly, which could sometimes cause certain levels to be impossible to load into. - This is usually caused by playing a multiworld that was generated with an old version of the apworld (3.4.5 or older). Don't forget to update the apworld! - Fixed P Rank locations being added to the goal level. - Added an option to automatically exclude locations in the goal level. - Fixed 8-3 theme #1 random music reverting back to the original music after restarting from a checkpoint. - Fixed incorrect logic for Deathcatchers in 8-3. [@surytrap] #48 - Fixed instantly unlocking a hint in The Cyber Grind when starting on a wave higher than 1. - Final ranks for levels are now not saved if cheats are enabled. - Enemy counters will not be added to levels if the total number of enemies is zero. - Added YAML-less support for Universal Tracker.

entry.title: Oblivion Remastered v0.5.0
entry.content:
## How to use
For Archipelago instructions, see https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/
1) Generate a new Archipelago multiworld. 2) Launch the Oblivion Remastered Client from the ArchipelagoLauncher.exe. 3) Connect to your server. 4) Once connected, you can launch Oblivion Remastered through your mod manager and start playing.
## New Features:
- Kill Tracking - Nirnroot Locations - Exploration Sidequests - Wealth Sidequests - Traps - Deathlink - Automated Boss Chest & Nirnroot Tracking - Treasure Hunter Goal - Nirnsanity Goal

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.4
entry.content: ## Quick patch: * Reconcile boolean logic between client and server when prog groups are in OR branches * Added debug logging

entry.title: Baba Is You v0.3.0
entry.content:
Tiny update to fix logic for one singular level. Wow! Only the APWorld was updated.
NOTE: v0.6.7 of Archipelago is required due to the use of Rule Builder.
## Adjustments/fixes: - (APWorld) Fixed logic for Stardrop (one solution was impossible without G)
This contains the Baba Is You APWorld, the Babapelago levelpack, and extraslot.lua. ONLY THE APWORLD IS REQUIRED! It contains the levelpack as well and will automatically install the pack when starting. The levelpack is included in case this feature doesn't work for whatever reason, and extraslot.lua is a global mod needed to play more than three slots at once, if you wish to do so. The host only needs the APWorld no matter what.
For installation instructions, PLEASE check out the [readme](worlds/baba_is_you/BABAPELAGO_README.md). Very important!
KNOWN ISSUES: - The client may suddenly stop sending checks (I haven't encountered this in a while, so it may have been fixed). Closing and re-opening the client should fix the issue. If you DON'T relaunch Baba Is You, the checks should send again next time you complete a level. - There may be issues on Mac and Linux, since I haven't been able to test those myself. Please report any issues you experience. - Normal/hard logic has been well tested, although It was not feasible to test every possible combination of items. Please report any issues. In particular, Ultimate Maze's transforms are a complicated case. - Some non-ascii or punctation characters may display strangely in the client, but this hasn't caused any crashes from my testing. Supposedly this does cause a crash on Mac, although I'm hesitant to fully confirm this.

entry.title: Cyberpunk 2077 v0.0.1
entry.content:
# New Features - Weapon Restrictions: Can be set to not allow you to equip certain weapons period, or require a pass to equip them which is obtained from the multiworld
# Fixes and Improvements - Fixed NCPD scanner missions trigger "Gig: Hi Ho Silver Lining" - Beat on the Brat: Kabuki doesn't appear in the Locations list despite it being required for progression - Several quests listed in "Locations" were part of either cut content, or pure logic for cyberpunks quest backend and have been removed - Crafting components (both items and quickhacks) have been added to the filler items pool - Overhauled the backend ID assignment to be done at generation - Various generation stability improvements - Client <-> Game connection stability improvements (You may see the game disconnect and reconnect when loading saves, this is expected)

entry.title: Vacation Simulator v0.0.4
entry.content:
New: - `Early Big Item` Option. - This option forces an addition `Gate Unlock` or `Camera` early. This should reduce early locking in multiworlds, and slightly lower `Fill Error` generation failures when generating solo.
Changes: - Removed location data from slot data - Removed the `helpers.py` file - After further research, it seems like the mod was not actually reading the location data out of slot data. And since the only thing in helpers.py` was something to help with filling the location data, both have been removed. This should lower slot data size significantly, and slightly speed up gen output.
This update does not require a mod update.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/Archipelago/compare/vacation_simulator_0.0.3...vacation_simulator_0.0.4

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.4.post2
entry.content:
Fixed Mousillon progressive buildings. Increased max sphere count. Fixed modded factions sending checks for their normal start pos in spheres.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: Lightning Returns: Final Fantasy XIII v0.5.0rc0.post0
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bartz24/ArchipelagoLR/commits/0.5.0-pre-release

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.6
entry.content:
## What's Changed * local_items => Be able to randomize an item or a subset of items to a defiend subset of locations. by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/75
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.5...0.4.6
